headline: OLAY Peptide Research Puts New Spotlight On Procter And Gamble Valuation
summary: OLAY, a core Procter & Gamble brand, has unveiled new skin aging research at a leading dermatology conference. The findings highlight cell adhesion as a key driver of visible skin aging, expanding focus beyond collagen alone. Proprietary peptide technologies informed by this research are being integrated into existing OLAY formulas. The work is backed by clinical studies and is intended to move quickly from the lab into consumer products. Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG), trading at $144.44, is...
